_meta.description: LAYER 2.1 — organ functions, failure modes, cascade sequences
_meta.source: Robbins Pathologic Basis of Disease 10th ed, Guyton Physiology

anatomic_constants.innervation: T2-T6 visceral; pleura T2-T6 somatic; diaphragm C3-C5
T6-T9 visceral; phrenic C3-C5 if diaphragm
L4-S2 cutaneous; deep veins minimal nociception
CN VII brainstem; chorda tympani for taste
L4-S1 for sciatic; other levels for other radiculopathies

thalamus._review_note: Cascade authored by Claude from textbook knowledge (Adams & Victor, Fisher's lacunar syndromes). Needs medical review before disease label can be published to patients.

anatomic_constants.vascular_supply: thalamoperforating (PCA P1) + thalamogeniculate (PCA P2) + tuberothalamic (PComm) + posterior choroidal (PCA)
anatomic_constants.nuclei_relevant: VPL VPM VL DM pulvinar reticular
